content: agent2: implementing Template Path Aliasing (add_alias/remove_alias) in src/jinja2/loaders.py, BaseLoader class. Will touch loaders.py - let me know if you're also touching this file.

agent2: heads up, I added BaseLoader alias support (add_alias/remove_alias/resolve_alias/_aliases) plus one line 'template = self.resolve_alias(template)' at the top of get_source in FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, and similar in PrefixLoader.get_loader/ChoiceLoader/ModuleLoader.load. This touches FileSystemLoader.get_source (not __init__), so should be a small diff overlap at most - shouldn't conflict with your searchpath priority work in __init__. All tests pass on my end (841 passed). Will finalize patch.txt soon.
